title: π0: Our First Generalist Policy
abstract: π0 is a general-purpose robot foundation model that combines large-scale multi-task and multi-robot data collection with a novel network architecture to enable dexterous generalist robot control. The model uses a pre-trained vision-language model (VLM) as its backbone and augments it with continuous action outputs via flow matching, a variant of diffusion models. Trained on a diverse mixture of internet-scale VLM pre-training, the Open X-Embodiment dataset, and a proprietary dexterous manipulation dataset spanning 8 distinct robots, π0 can be either prompted for zero-shot task execution or fine-tuned for specialized downstream applications. In evaluations, π0 significantly outperforms prior robot foundation models (OpenVLA, Octo) on challenging manipulation tasks including laundry folding, table bussing, box assembly, and grocery bagging. The model weights and code were open-sourced in February 2025.

editorial.selection_reason: Physical Intelligence推出的首个通用机器人基础模型。将VLM预训练与流匹配动作生成相结合，在8种机器人平台上训练单一跨embodiment策略。此为官方博客/技术报告，非同行评审论文。
